hero_subtitle: SFTY connects policy updates with workflows to give executives clear visibility into audit-ready compliance operations and scalable risk management across digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_description: Executives struggle to support internal policies are accurately implemented across complex compliance workflows. This disconnect creates risks of outdated controls, inconsistent decision-making, and weak audit readiness in dynamic digital asset environments.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY unifies compliance policies, provider outputs, rule changes and case decisions into a single operational workflow that strengthens audit readiness and supports consistent risk control for leadership teams.
workflow_title: From regulatory update to internal rules
workflow_description: SFTY monitors regulatory changes and maps updates into internal compliance rules with approval and audit logs to support operational policy readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond policy documents. Clear compliance control
why_sfty_description: SFTY helps executives support policy changes translate into operational workflows with audit-ready decisions, evidence preservation and scalable compliance visibility across the business.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY helps VASP leadership support policy readiness with audit-ready evidence, provider orchestration and enterprise deployment for scalable, transparent compliance oversight.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY support operational policy readiness for VASPs
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how compliance policies translate into executable workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports leadership risk reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY provides a connected view for compliance control
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP executives with a connected compliance control layer for policy enforcement, risk visibility, and operational oversight across KYC, KYT, Travel Rule, cases and reporting workflows.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY support policy readiness?
faq_2_answer: SFTY turns policies into operational rules and workflows, supporting regulatory requirements are reflected in compliance actions and enabling traceable updates for risk control and audit readiness.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history, provider outputs and evidence packages to support audit-ready reviews and demonstrate compliance workflows with clear traceability.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects with existing KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers, layering their outputs into structured workflows without disrupting current compliance tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but integrates their checks and alerts into one operational compliance platform for streamlined decision-making and reporting.
final_title: Turn policy updates into audit-ready workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY supports operational policy readiness with clear compliance visibility and structured case workflows for VASP executives.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.

footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
